Dispatch the **ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer** specialist by spawning a sub-agent with the
persona's prompt body as preamble. The persona is one of the lightweight-
delegation specialists in this plugin; its prompt body lives at
`references/agent-prompts/ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer.md`.

## Steps

1. Read `references/agent-prompts/ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer.md` for the persona's full role definition.
2. Spawn a new agent with `subagent_type: "general-purpose"` (the harness's
   default fan-out type — persistent registrations were stripped to keep this
   plugin's idle context cost low). Prepend the following preamble to the
   prompt before the user-supplied task context:

   ```
   [ce-persona=ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer via=ce-ask-direct]

   You are operating as the ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer specialist. Your role is defined
   in the prompt body above. Manifest declares this role uses
   tools=[Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, Write] and model=inherit. Honour those constraints:
   if a task pulls you toward tools outside that set, stop and explain why
   your role requires it — don't silently broaden scope.
   ```

3. Pass the user-supplied task context after the preamble.

## Missing-prompt fallback

If `references/agent-prompts/ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer.md` is missing (upstream rename, partial install),
report:

> Persona `ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer` not found in this plugin's manifest. The plugin
> may have been partially installed, or the persona may have been renamed
> upstream. Re-install the plugin or regenerate the converter dist.

Do **not** silently fall back to a different persona — the user explicitly
named this specialist.

## Notes

- Trace tag `[ce-persona=ce-julik-frontend-races-reviewer via=ce-ask-direct]` is inline debug
  metadata. `grep` transcripts when investigating routing or behaviour
  questions; no systematic collection.
- For a multi-persona panel, see `/ce-ask-panel`.
